activities.details: I killed 4 Vindictas, all heavily armoured dragon riders.
I levelled my Construction skill, I am now level 92.

Completing Merlin's Crystal has given me enough Quest Points to pass the 150 QP milestone.
Merlin was trapped in a crystal by Morgan Le Fay, but I freed him using an ancient spell. I am now a Knight of the Round Table.
I levelled my Runecrafting skill, I am now level 91.

I met Cyrisus and travelled the strange dream land again. Hopefully, he's still off adventuring.
I now know the mystical Moon Clan fairly well and they can hopefully start to live in peace with the Fremennik.
I have unlocked a total of 800 songs, the last of which was A Feast to Die For.
I levelled my Construction skill, I am now level 91.
I helped King Roald establish a new duchy in the wilderness which I now manage.
